{{Relic Infobox|Glass Eye|2}}
{{R|Glass Eye||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relic}}. Upon pickup, you are offered 5 card rewards, with their rarities fixed at 2 sets of 3 {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common|Commons|2}}, 2 sets of {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommons|2}}, and 1 set of {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Rares|2}}.

== Obtaining Glass Eye ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 2|Act 2}}, can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Glass Eye''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Electric Shrymp||2}}, {{R|Sand Castle||2}}, {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}}, and {{R|Sea Glass||2}}, only 1 of the 5 can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
